problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: If Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) is applied to formation, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
